text:
Cold Light is the 16th track on the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack, as well as the 14th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack Complete Album. It was composed and arranged by Kohta Yamamoto.

All occurrences

Episode 65 - In a flashback, Commander Magath and Willy Tybur discuss how to anticipate the coming attack
Episode 68 - In a flashback, Yelena introduces herself to the Scouts
Episode 74 - In a flashback, Zeke and Eren finally meet
Episode 77 - Armin reveals his theory for what Eren is planning
Special 1 and Episode 89 - Yelena reveals Eren's plan
